description_long: This axe features a double-bladed head with jagged, asymmetrical edges, crafted from dark, metallic material that appears worn and battle-scarred. The central section of the axe head is adorned with large, crystalline blue shards that protrude outward, giving it a mystical or enchanted appearance. The handle is made of gnarled, twisted wood, wrapped with teal and red leather straps for improved grip and visual contrast. Decorative blue stones are embedded along the handle, complementing the crystals on the head. The overall design is rugged and fantastical, suggesting it could belong to a fantasy or post-apocalyptic setting. The axe is visually striking, with a blend of natural and magical elements, making it stand out in any urban or themed environment.
description: A rugged double-bladed axe with jagged metal edges, blue crystals, and a twisted wooden handle wrapped in leather and adorned with stones.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full double-bladed head, blue crystals, and the detailed handle wrapping.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thickness of the axe head, the protruding blue crystals, and the layered handle wrappings.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the axe head, the full spread of blue crystals, and the twisted wood handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizes the blade's edge profile, the pointed top, and the handle's curvature.
attribute_handle_type: Curved, gnarled wooden handle with leather wrappings and embedded stones; ergonomic and uniquely styled for grip.
attribute_blade_design: Double-bladed, jagged-edged head with asymmetrical, battle-worn metal and prominent blue crystal inlays; no beard or poll.
attribute_mounting_style: Fantasy-style, with the blade and crystals integrated into the handle, appearing wedged and magically fused.
